response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Developer with 15+ years across embedded systems, web, mobile, and cloud — making him severely overqualified for an entry-level junior role. While Java appears in his skill set and he has solid OOP and agile credentials, the position explicitly requires strong German communication, whereas his German is self-assessed as only basic. There is also no exposure to the insurance sector, and his current compensation expectations would almost certainly misalign with a junior-level offer.
strengths: Extensive OOP and agile experience (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) well exceeds minimum technical bar
Java listed as a known language with hands-on use in robotic arm and mobile orchestration tooling at Altom
CS degree from IIT Bombay satisfies the academic qualification requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified: 15+ years at Staff/Senior level makes a junior role an implausible fit professionally and financially
German proficiency is self-rated 'Basic', failing the stated requirement for strong verbal and written German
Zero exposure to the insurance sector or insurance-domain digitalization projects
